name: Es Caló Blanc
description: A tiny cove, barely a few metres wide, tucked between the rocks and counted among the smallest on the island; a curious, little-known spot for a brief stop. Note: confirm the exact access on site.

highlights: looking out over one of the tiniest coves on the island
a quick dip among the rocks in a curious little spot
combining it with Punta Prima or Binibeca, which are right next door
